summary.lycopene_titer_curated_coverage_after: 7/42 = 0.17 (further below threshold due to S004 removals; S003 coverage gain rejected under cap constraint)

edges_removed_by_id.N042: IDI -> IPP (+1) -- dropped to stay under the 7-activator hard cap on IPP after DXR addition. IDI still reaches phenotype via IDI -> DMAPP (N046).
edges_removed_by_id.N080: RPOS -> Lycopene_Titer (+1) -- removed per JUDGE S004. Effect fully captured by RPOS -> KATE -> ROS -> Lycopene_Titer.
edges_removed_by_id.N086: KATE -> Lycopene_Titer (+1) -- removed per JUDGE S004. Effect fully captured by KATE -> ROS -> Lycopene_Titer.

suggestions_applied.action: Added DXS -> G3P (-1) [N092, curated E143] and DXS -> Pyruvate (-1) [N093, curated E144] per Wang 2009 MAGE substrate-depletion biology.
suggestions_applied.biological_justification: Dxs consumes 1x G3P + 1x Pyruvate per DXP produced. At high OE, Dxs depletes both substrates, explaining the Wang 2009 MAGE non-monotonic RBS-tuning optimum. Without these edges, Dxs OE predictions are monotonically positive, which is biologically wrong for strong OE.
suggestions_applied.companion_edge_considerations: Kept G3P -> IPP (N040) and Pyruvate -> IPP (N041) to preserve G3P/Pyruvate phenotype connectivity (removing them would make those nodes floating). The signal cancellation concern is mitigated by the fact that bounded-inverse inhibition (min(1/product, 10)) does not fully cancel the direct DXS -> IPP (+1) activator path because they act multiplicatively under different saturation regimes.
suggestions_applied.motif: Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance (BUILDER_AGENT.md §12 Motif 4) applied to G3P and Pyruvate pools.

suggestions_applied.action: Added DXR GENE node with 3 curated edges: Arabinose -> DXR (+1) [N094, E057], NADPH -> DXR (+1) [N095, E095], DXR -> IPP (+1) [N096, E028]. Did NOT add IspG, IspH, IspD, IspE, IspF (preferred/full variants) to avoid further inflating the IPP activator list. Full MEP chain restructure deferred to REFINEMENT.
suggestions_applied.companion_edge_removal: Dropped IDI -> IPP (N042) to keep IPP at the 7-activator hard cap after DXR addition. IDI still reaches the phenotype via IDI -> DMAPP (N046). The primary biological role of Idi is IPP<->DMAPP isomerisation, captured by IDI -> DMAPP; the direct IDI -> IPP (N042) was biologically minor (backward isomerisation from DMAPP).
suggestions_applied.biological_justification: Dxr (= ispC) is the second rate-limiting MEP enzyme; combined dxs+dxr OE reaches ~16x lycopene (Wang 2020 review). Without DXR as a node, ispC perturbations cannot be mapped.
suggestions_applied.motif: Standard linear cascade step with NADPH cofactor gating.

suggestions_applied.action: Removed N080 (RPOS -> Lycopene_Titer +1) and N086 (KATE -> Lycopene_Titer +1). Both effects are already fully captured by the indirect ROS route.
suggestions_applied.biological_justification: Per Bongers 2015 explicit reinterpretation of Alper 2005: 'knockout of rpoS does not influence flux through the MEP pathway... RpoS has no effect on enzyme abundance'. The RpoS effect on lycopene is entirely ROS-mediated via KatE induction.

rejections.proposed_by_judge: Add SodA, CRP, DgkA nodes with direct curated edges SodA->Lycopene_Titer (E131), CRP->Lycopene_Titer (E062), DgkA->Lycopene_Titer (E134). Raise Lycopene_Titer curated-edge coverage from 10/43 = 0.23 to ~13/43 = 0.30.
rejection_rationale: HARD CONSTRAINT: user orchestrator message explicitly states 'Lycopene_Titer input cap is 7' and 'Net effect must leave Lycopene_Titer at <=7 inputs. The judge designed S003+S004 together to achieve this.'
ARITHMETIC: Lycopene_Titer had 9 inputs (5 act + 4 inh). S004 removes 2 direct edges (net -2). For total <=7, S003 can add at most 0 direct edges.
CURATED EVIDENCE: SodA, CRP, DgkA have ONLY direct-to-Lycopene_Titer curated edges (E131, E062, E134). No curated indirect routes exist.

SECONDARY EDGES CHECKED: CRP has E100 (CRP->Pgi) but marked LOW confidence and in_model=false -- the judge only suggested it optionally as CRP->DXS (a target that doesn't exist in E100 anyway). No secondary curated edges exist for SodA or DgkA.

NO-FLOATING-NODES RULE: Adding SodA/CRP/DgkA as nodes WITHOUT their only curated edges would violate the hard no-floating-nodes rule (BUILDER_AGENT.md §1.1 rule 1: 'every node in network.json must reach the PHENOTYPE via a directed edge path').

CONCLUSION: The two hard rules (7-input cap, no-floating-nodes) combined with the curated-evidence constraint make S003 impossible to apply as specified. The judge's own math (3 new direct edges adding +3, S004 removing 2, net +1, landing at 10 inputs) did not actually satisfy the cap; the user's instruction overrides the judge.
rejections.impact: Lycopene_Titer §9.11 KEY PLAYER UNDER-REPRESENTATION flag is NOT closed in iteration 2. Coverage ratio moves from 10/42 (0.24) down to 7/42 (0.17) because of the S004 removals. This is a known regression in coverage, accepted as the cost of maintaining biological correctness (removing redundant double-count paths) and the 7-input cap.
remediation_paths: OPTION A (for iteration 3): User may clarify the cap-vs-coverage tradeoff. If the 7-cap is softened to match the judge's review (which accepted 9 inputs), apply S003 as specified.

OPTION B: File Step 1.5 re-open requests for indirect curated edges (e.g., SodA -> ROS, CRP -> DXS, DgkA -> PLSB) with primary-source evidence sentences. If any become available, route the new nodes via intermediate edges so Lycopene_Titer direct-input count stays at 7.
OPTION C: REFINEMENT can revisit if perturbation tests specifically probe SodA/CRP/DgkA and fail (flags them for literature_gap rather than missing-node).

suggestions_deferred.reason: PMK addition would bring MVA activator count on IPP to 8, exceeding the 7 hard cap, unless MVA chain is simultaneously restructured (S008).
Curated_edges.json has ZWF only as ZWF -> G3P (-1) substrate-diverter; no explicit ZWF -> NADPH (+1) edge. BUILDER cannot fabricate.
Adding OxyR+KatG requires KatG -> ROS edge which is not curated; partial addition would leave KatG with no out-edge to ROS (floating).
MVA chain restructure adds 4 intermediate METABOLITE nodes; judge said defer to REFINEMENT unless MVA mutant-chain coverage warrants it.
Plsc single-edge peripheral (E083) would inflate Lycopene_Titer activator count; same cap conflict as S003.
NADPH -> Mevalonate (E021) duplicates NADPH -> HMGR -> Mevalonate.
Contingent on IspE being added; iteration 2 added only DXR.
Paywall documentation carryover; reflected in network.json metadata.

hard_rule_checks.no_floating_nodes: VERIFIED (post-script): backward BFS from Lycopene_Titer reaches all 62 nodes. DXR reaches phenotype via DXR -> IPP -> ... -> Lycopene_Titer. IDI still reaches via IDI -> DMAPP -> FPP -> ... -> Lycopene_Titer.
hard_rule_checks.doi_on_every_edge: VERIFIED: all 5 new edges carry flat-format EvidenceEntry with doi/title/authors/year/journal/evidence_sentence/claim.
hard_rule_checks.is_source_flag_consistency: VERIFIED: DXR has 2 incoming edges (Arabinose, NADPH) and is_source=false.
hard_rule_checks.single_phenotype_node: VERIFIED: single PHENOTYPE-typed node Lycopene_Titer matching metadata.phenotype_node.
hard_rule_checks.ipp_activator_cap: AT CAP: IPP has 7 activators (DXS, DXR, G3P, Pyruvate, Mevalonate, MVK, MVD) = at the 7 hard cap, not over.
hard_rule_checks.lycopene_input_cap: UNDER CAP: Lycopene_Titer has 7 inputs (3 activators + 4 inhibitors), exactly at the 7 cap, not over.
hard_rule_checks.phenotype_activator_guideline: WITHIN GUIDELINE: Lycopene_Titer has 3 activators, within BUILDER_AGENT.md §10 'Phenotype activators 3-5' target.
hard_rule_checks.source_percentage: 46.77% - within softened 30-50% target, well under 60% hard cap.

equation_check.wt_baseline_1_0: VERIFIED: all 62 equations produce node=1.0 when all inputs=1.0.
equation_check.formula_field_present: VERIFIED: every algebraic and ODE equation has a non-empty formula field.
equations_modified: G3P (added DXS as third inhibitor; was ZWF, GAPA; now ZWF, GAPA, DXS)
Pyruvate (added DXS as third inhibitor; was PPS, LDH; now PPS, LDH, DXS)
IPP (removed IDI from activators; added DXR; activator set DXS, DXR, G3P, Pyruvate, Mevalonate, MVK, MVD)
Lycopene_Titer (removed RPOS and KATE from activators; activator set CRTI, Phytoene, PLSB; inhibitors unchanged: GPP, FPP, Temperature, ROS)
